name: pre-flight-check
description: Stop your AI agent from declaring 'done' on broken code. Fail-fast quality gate that runs Typecheck, Lint, Test, and Security Audit sequentially before any task is marked complete.

plugins.name: pre-flight-check
plugins.description: Fail-fast Typecheck → Lint → Test → Security Audit gate. Auto-detects Node.js and Python. Forbids the agent from suppressing errors. Zero runtime dependencies.
